creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are some things need to be fixed:

- Port uses deprecated @dirrm/@dirrmtry keywords in pkg-plist,
  please see /usr/ports/CHANGES entry 20140922. For example
  this snippet:

@owner www
@group www
@dirrm %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default
@dirrmtry %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory
@dirrmtry %%ETCDIR%%/snapshots
@dirrmtry %%ETCDIR%%
@dirrmtry /var/cache/trafficserver
@dirrmtry /var/log/trafficserver
@dirrmtry /var/run/trafficserver
@owner root
@group wheel

Can be converted to:

@dir(www,www,) %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default
@dir(www,www,) %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory
@dir(www,www,) %%ETCDIR%%/snapshots
@dir(www,www,) %%ETCDIR%%
@dir(www,www,) /var/cache/trafficserver
@dir(www,www,) /var/log/trafficserver
@dir(www,www,) /var/run/trafficserver

- There are leftover files in stage dir:

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
